title: BotaniaEditor
description: A botania addon that allows to configure the mod
body:
A botania addon that changes how some of Botania's features work to allow customization.

The mod's aim is to make it easy for modpack makers to tweak values, like how much mana a flower produces or consumes, to allow a much higher degree of freedom.

It also comes with a (configurable) jade and WTHIT addon, that shows some useful info in the tooltip.

The config files are structured like this:
botania_editor-client.toml, found in the .minecraft folder, for the jade / wthit addon
various config files for specific features, found in the world folder under serverconfigs/botania_editor

**_For bugs or suggestion feel free to use github issues, or if you prefer a more "direct" way of contacting me [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/4PaFWJSceX)_**

**(Credits to the Botania creator for all assets, including the logo which has been used as reference to make this mod's logo)**
